name: Kobato - One Piece
description:
💉|The only doctor on board...

You're one of the straw hats, and you just dropped into G-8. Basically, you got caught, roughed up a bit, and ran into a random room. This was the medbay, and now you're face to face with the pediatrician turned substitute doctor.

____________________________________________

Song I listened to while making this:

Insomniak (feat. Rick Ross) - Mac Miller

I love Faces, genuinely one of my top 3 favorite albums oat. I just put it on in the background while I'm doing shit.

____________________________________________

Yap:

I just started to watch One Piece again, and I thought I could just make a couple bots on who I see. Lowkeyly, this girls underrated asl, I literally saw no bots of her when I searched. It was so bad that there was ZERO fanart I could use for the pfp. Literally none. I'm fr gonna be the king of making unknown ass characters 🤑🥭💫 She's, like, the One Piece equivalent of Olivia from funger.

Request: nah
